{{Infobox character
| name = Shyrax the Third
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Queen of the planet Karosha, exiled Karoshan queen
| affiliations = Karosha
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax the Third is the legitimate [[Queen]] of the planet [[Karosha]]. Having ascended to the throne nine years ago following her mother's abdication, she is forty-one years old. Her reign was interrupted when the [[Dragon Court]] convicted her of treason for unknown reasons, leading to her cousin, [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]], temporarily taking control. A nine-foot-tall [[Karoshan]] with golden hair and a forehead circlet, she is a highly versatile combatant and specialist. She is proficient with force-blades, pistols, and magic wands, and she has demonstrated mastery in piloting, military command, and technical repairs. Seeking to reclaim her throne, she joined the crew of [[The Last Horizon]] as their [[Commander]], though she maintains a firm requirement for leadership and refuses to act against her own people. While operating as a rebel, she utilizes [[Karoshan forces]] to bolster her strength and aims to eventually negotiate an end to the ongoing war once she is restored to power.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Shyrax the Third]] is the rightful [[Queen]] of the planet [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Shyrax the Third]] is a nine-foot-tall [[Karoshan]] and the rightful [[Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax the Third]] is a nine-foot-tall [[Karoshan]] woman with leathery yellow skin and bronze eyes.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax the Third]] is the exiled [[Karoshan queen]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax the Third]] wears a diadem.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax the Third]] has yellow arms and wears elaborate armor shimmering with enchantments.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Karoshan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
